articles.title: Tropical Storm Meari Hits Japan, Bringing Heavy Rain to Tokyo Region
articles.summary: A powerful tropical storm named Meari made landfall in Wakayama Prefecture in Japan early on Wednesday morning, bringing strong winds and very heavy rainfall. The storm caused serious disruption across the greater Tokyo area, affecting millions of people. Japan's national news agency reported on Thursday that widespread flooding and transport delays were among the main concerns for residents. Meteorologists had been closely tracking the storm as it moved northward through the Pacific. Authorities urged people living in low-lying areas to stay indoors and follow emergency instructions. The storm is a reminder of how vulnerable coastal cities in Asia can be during typhoon season.

lv1: Which part of Japan did Tropical Storm Meari first hit when it made landfall? (熱帶風暴「薔薇」登陸日本時，最先吹襲哪個地方？)
What kind of bad weather did the storm bring to the Tokyo area? (這場風暴為東京地區帶來了什麼惡劣天氣？)
lv2: Why do you think authorities asked people in low-lying areas to stay indoors during the storm? (你認為當局為什麼要求低窪地區的居民在風暴期間留在室內？)
How might heavy rainfall from a tropical storm affect a big city like Tokyo? (熱帶風暴帶來的大雨會怎樣影響像東京這樣的大城市？)
lv3: As climate change makes storms stronger and more frequent, what responsibilities do governments and individuals share in keeping coastal cities safe? (隨著氣候變化令風暴越來越強烈，政府和個人各自有什麼責任保護沿海城市的安全？)

Some people argue that cities should be redesigned to better handle flooding, while others say it costs too much. What do you think is the right balance between preparation and cost? (有人認為城市應重新設計以應對洪水，但也有人認為代價太高。你認為在防災準備與成本之間，應如何取得平衡？)

articles.title: Tech Glitch Sends Wrong Primary 1 School Placement Results to Over 16,000 Hong Kong Parents
articles.summary: The night before Hong Kong's Primary 1 unified school placement results were officially released, thousands of families received a shock. A technical error by the Education Bureau caused incorrect placement messages to be sent to more than 16,000 parents. The messages showed the wrong year and registration dates, though the student ID numbers and first-choice schools listed were correct. Many worried parents immediately contacted the bureau for clarification. The Education Bureau later confirmed the error and apologised, assuring families that the actual placement results would be announced as scheduled. The incident has raised fresh questions about the reliability of government digital systems.

lv1: How many parents in Hong Kong received the wrong school placement message by mistake? (香港有多少名家長誤收了錯誤的學校派位短訊？)
Which government department was responsible for sending out the Primary 1 placement results? (哪個政府部門負責發送小一派位結果？)
lv2: Why might receiving the wrong placement result cause so much worry for parents and children? (為什麼收到錯誤的派位結果會令家長和小朋友感到那麼擔心？)
What steps should government departments take to prevent technical errors like this from happening in the future? (政府部門應採取什麼措施，防止日後再發生這類技術失誤？)
lv3: This incident shows that even official government systems can make mistakes. Should citizens have more ways to independently check or verify important information from the government? Why or why not? (這次事件說明即使是官方政府系統也可能出錯。市民是否應有更多途徑獨立核實政府的重要資訊？為什麼？)

Some families feel the Primary 1 placement system puts too much pressure on young children and parents. Do you agree that school admission processes should be changed to reduce this stress? What alternatives might work better? (有些家庭認為小一派位制度令幼童和家長承受過大壓力。你是否同意應改變入學程序以減輕壓力？有什麼替代方案可能更好？)

articles.title: 天文台：南海低壓區增強為熱帶低氣壓　距港約800公里
articles.summary: 香港天文台發布消息，指位於南海東北部的一個低壓區已進一步增強，成為熱帶低氣壓，現時距離香港約800公里範圍之內。熱帶低氣壓是颱風發展的前期階段，若繼續增強，有機會進一步升級為熱帶風暴甚至颱風。天文台提醒市民密切留意天氣變化，做好防風準備。專家指出，每年五月至十一月是香港的颱風季節，市民應提早了解颱風應對措施，確保家人安全。

lv1: 天文台說這個熱帶低氣壓現時距離香港大約多遠？
熱帶低氣壓如果繼續增強，可能會變成什麼？
lv2: 為什麼天文台要提醒市民提早做好防風準備，而不是等颱風靠近才行動？
香港的颱風季節是哪幾個月份？為什麼這段時間特別容易有颱風？
lv3: 隨著全球氣候變化，颱風有可能變得更頻繁和更強烈。香港政府和市民應如何共同應對這個長遠挑戰？
有人認為香港現有的颱風預警系統已經足夠，但也有人認為需要進一步改善。你認為現時的系統有哪些地方可以做得更好？

articles.title: 食安中心發現嬰幼兒奶粉疑含細菌毒素　即時下架回收
articles.summary: 香港食物環境衞生署食物安全中心透過定期食品監測，發現市面上某批次嬰幼兒配方奶粉的樣本，疑似含有蠟樣芽孢桿菌所產生的耐熱毒素。這種毒素即使加熱後仍不會被消滅，可能對嬰幼兒健康造成風險。食安中心已即時要求相關零售商及進口商將受影響批次的產品全面停售及下架，並展開預防性回收行動。當局提醒家長暫停使用該批次產品，如有疑問應諮詢醫生。事件反映食品安全監察的重要性，尤其是針對嬰幼兒食品。

lv1: 食安中心在哪類食品中發現了疑似含有細菌毒素？
食安中心發現問題後，要求商店做了什麼？
lv2: 為什麼嬰幼兒奶粉中含有細菌毒素會特別令人擔心？嬰幼兒與成年人有什麼不同？
政府為什麼要定期對市面上的食品進行安全監測？這對我們有什麼好處？
lv3: 食品安全事故一旦發生，可能影響消費者對品牌及政府監管機構的信心。你認為應如何重建公眾信任？企業和政府各有什麼責任？
有意見認為香港的食品安全標準應與國際標準看齊，甚至更嚴格。你同意嗎？更嚴格的標準可能帶來哪些好處和壞處？
